title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer/ Chief Operating Officer
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitmandi.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Mandi Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, and/or technical background is mandatory; Master's/Ph.D./MBA is preferred. Minimum 15 years of progressive industry/corporate experience with at least 5 years in a senior leadership/managerial role.
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, and/or technical background is mandatory. Master's/Ph.D./MBA is preferred. Minimum 15 years of progressive industry/corporate experience with at least 5 years in a senior leadership/managerial role in startup incubation, corporate innovation, venture building, entrepreneurship development, business strategy, technology commercialization, investment management, or ecosystem development.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
